title: Decadent Chinese Goats Cheese Chow-Fun
description: A rich, umami-packed Chinese-inspired dish featuring shattering crispy noodles, creamy goats cheese, and a hint of tempering chocolate. Perfect for a post-workout meal that's both rejuvenating and satisfying.

ingredients.name: noodles
ingredients.notes: preferably rice-based or egg-based for best results

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the noodles and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Add the soy sauce, sugar, and sesame oil, and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the goats cheese and stir-fry until it starts to melt and the noodles are well coated.
Add the chopped scallions and toasted sesame seeds, and stir-fry for another minute.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter or individual plates.
Drizzle with tempering chocolate and serve immediately.
